description: Legal document. In Hebrew. Location: Fustat. Appointment of a judge, listing all of his prerogatives. The handwriting is very familiar; late 12th or early 13th century? Needs examination. Below there are jottings, mainly Coptic numerals it seems. This shelfmark also includes three folios of Talmud in the hand of Yosef Rosh ha-Seder.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
